message:
Add pre-commit linting step to commit workflow

The /git:commit command now runs the project linter before staging
and committing, catching issues early.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+---
+title: Pre-commit linting step
+type: change
+authors:
+  - mavam
+  - claude
+created: 2026-01-05T12:42:39.234359Z
+---
+
+The `/git:commit` command now includes a linting step before staging and
+committing changes. If a project has a linter configured, it runs automatically
+to catch issues early.

@@ -27,7 +27,11 @@ separate commits:
 
 If all staged changes form a single logical unit, proceed to the next step.
 
-## 3. Stage and commit
+## 3. Lint
+
+If the project has a linter configured, run it before committing.
+
+## 4. Stage and commit
 
 Stage changes and commit. Invoke `git:writing-commit-messages`.
